  1. Work

CityCamp

Global cities and civic technology unconference.

The first CityCamp – an unconference focused on cities and civic technology – was held January 23-24, 2010, in Chicago, organized by Kevin Curry and Jen Pahlka. Afterwards, Kevin and I developed it as an open source brand so that anyone could host events anywhere. Since then, there have been self-organized CityCamp events worldwide.

CityCamp website
